rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-based assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract content.
generic_rules: Ensure all AGREE variables are grounded in visible AADL identifiers or explicit declarations.
Place implementation-level assignments in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections.
Use component type annexes for assumptions and guarantees that reference component ports.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference valid component ports or variables in scope.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not use AADL property names (e.g., Deadline, Period) as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
